name: Quick Barbecue Beef Bake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Bisquick Original or Reduced fat baking mix
recipeInstructions:
Prep time: 18 minutes. Bake time: 27 minutes.
Heat oven to 400°F. Cook ground beef and 1/2 cup of the onion in a skillet over medium heat until the beef is brown; drain excess fat. Stir in barbecue sauce. Spoon into an ungreased baking dish (13x9x2 inches). Sprinkle with cheese.
Stir together the remaining Bisquick, milk, and eggs until blended. Pour over the beef mixture. Sprinkle with the remaining onion.
Bake for 25-27 minutes or until the crust is light golden brown.
